name: 祠堂仙凡對決
description: 在莊嚴的家族祠堂中，仙人與系統持有者展開終極對決。神聖空間中的超自然戰鬥將視覺衝擊力推到極致。
tags: 神聖祠堂被邪惡力量入侵+修為被奪的絕境+天地之子的逆轉

examples.drama_title: 💔Reborn! Family listened to my inner thoughts, scheming girl cry!#chinesedrama
examples.excerpt: Something's wrong, the pond is shaking. / Xie Qingwan, you're not dead. / I've used up all the points in the system. / You stole the fortune of your Xie family for future generations. / And all your cultivation.
examples.context: 神聖祠堂被邪惡力量入侵+修為被奪的絕境+天地之子的逆轉
